svg.text: Dr. Laura Mitchell — AI patient snapshot / visit prep
High-fidelity mockup · Attending physician · Bennett, Carol · desktop
Thursday, June 26 · 9:00 AM visit · Chronic care follow-up
AI snapshot · last 6 months · updated 8:54 AM.
Always verify against the full chart before acting.
Select the actions to take for this visit, then submit —
nothing is sent until you confirm.
2 of 5 addressed · checks pre-fill the note
Pulled from overdue screenings and active SDOH flags. Open “Why?” for the guideline source.
Diabetic foot exam — overdue since last visit
Annual comprehensive foot exam for all T2DM patients; deferred at 03/04 visit.
Problems, medications, labs, SDOH, and a suggested visit
agenda all live on one screen so Laura can prepare for
Carol's visit in under a minute, instead of opening four
DESIGN DECISION — SDOH REQUIRES EXPLICIT SUBMIT
Social risk factors are pre-flagged by AI, but nothing is
referred, offered, or logged until Laura reviews the list
and taps submit — there are no silent automated actions on
DESIGN DECISION — EVERY AGENDA ITEM CITES A SOURCE
Each suggested agenda item links to the specific guideline
— ADA, USPSTF, or CMS — that generated it, so Laura can
verify the recommendation instead of trusting the AI
DESIGN DECISION — CONSENT IS PART OF THE CTA
The primary action states plainly that starting the visit
also enables ambient listening, so consent to record is
never buried in a separate settings toggle.
